interactions.final_answer:
### 1. SCOPE CONFIG - **Scope name**: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet - **Description**: Central hub for firm-wide updates, line-of-business performance, risk management guidance, regulatory compliance, and tools supporting our Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy. - **Welcome message**: Welcome to the JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet—your gateway to FY2024 record results, CIB league table leadership, risk framework resources, and updates on our $17B technology investments driving client outcomes globally. - **image_url**: jp/logo.png - **primary_color**: #003B7A - **primary_color_contrast**: #FFFFFF - **secondary_color**: #117ACA - **warn_color**: #C8102E - **warn_color_contrast**: #FFFFFF - **number_of_highlights**: 4 - **highlights_carousel**: true - **highlights_style**: BannerCarousel - **Footer** (3 columns): - Column 1: **Company** – About (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about), Careers (https://careers.jpmorgan.com), Investor Relations (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir) - Column 2: **Businesses** – J.P. Morgan (https://www.jpmorgan.com), Chase (https://www.chase.com), Asset Management (https://am.jpmorgan.com) - Column 3: **Resources** – Newsroom (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories), Annual Report (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report), ESG (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/impact) - **Social links**: facebookLink (none), twitterLink (https://twitter.com/jpmorgan), linkedInLink (https://linkedin.com/company/jpmorgan-chase), instagramLink (none), youtubeLink (https://youtube.com/jpmorgan) - **navigation_links**: - topBarLinks: [{"caption": "Investor Relations", "link": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}, {"caption": "Careers", "link": "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {"caption": "Newsroom", "link": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories"}] - footerLinks: [{"caption": "J.P. Morgan", "link": "https://www.jpmorgan.com"}, {"caption": "Chase", "link": "https://www.chase.com"}, {"caption": "Onyx", "link": "https://www.jpmorgan.com/onyx"}, {"caption": "Business Principles", "link": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/governance/business-principles"}] - socialLinks: as above ### 2. CHANNEL ARCHITECTURE (5 channels) **PRIMARY channels** (3, all is_sticky: true; visible on homepage, eligible for highlights): Ch1, Ch2, Ch3. **SECONDARY channels** (2, is_sticky: false; utility focus): Ch4, Ch5. - **Ch1: Corporate & Investment Bank (PRIMARY)** - Purpose: Updates on CIB performance, markets leadership, deal flow, and institutional client coverage. - Type: public - Color: #003B7A - image_url: jp/stock_market.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: false - hide_highlights: false - Description:

The Corporate & Investment Bank drives global deal-making, markets execution, and institutional relationships. Stay informed on #1 league table rankings in M&A advisory, FX trading, and fixed income, alongside FY2024 revenue of ~$59B.

From equity underwriting to securities services custody, this channel covers the engine of our franchise.

- Tabs: ["Articles"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [] (broadcast-focused) - **Ch2: Consumer & Community Banking (PRIMARY)** - Purpose: News on Chase retail growth, customer milestones, and CCB segment results (~$60B FY2024 revenue). - Type: public - Color: #117ACA - image_url: jp/credit_card.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: false - hide_highlights: false - Description:

Chase serves ~86M consumers and small businesses through 4,900 branches and Chase.com. Track Sapphire Reserve innovations, credit card leadership, and mortgage/home equity performance.

This channel highlights our retail franchise's role in everyday financial lives.

- Tabs: ["Articles"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [] (broadcast-focused) - **Ch3: Risk Management & Compliance (PRIMARY)** - Purpose: Fortress Balance Sheet updates, regulatory guidance, stress test results, and mandatory policies. - Type: corporate - Color: #C8102E - image_url: jp/risk.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: false - hide_highlights: false - Description:

Independent risk oversight is our operating system—covering credit, market, liquidity, operational, and conduct risks. Access CET1 targets, VaR metrics, and annual training requirements.

Maintain our G-SIB resilience amid regulatory scrutiny from OCC, Fed, and global bodies.

- Tabs: ["Articles", "Pages"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: None - FAQ: [{"question": "What is the Information Barrier policy?", "answer": "Strict 'Chinese Walls' prevent MNPI sharing between units; consult Legal/Compliance before any cross-unit communication."}, {"question": "How do we report stress test results?", "answer": "DFAST/CCAR results are public; our CET1 exceeds minimums per Fortress Balance Sheet."}, {"question": "Who does the CRO report to?", "answer": "Directly to Jamie Dimon and the Board Risk Committee for independence."}] - **Ch4: Asset & Wealth Management (SECONDARY)** - Purpose: AWM performance (~$22B revenue), Private Bank updates, and $3.4T AUM insights. - Type: public - Color: #003B7A - image_url: jp/savings.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: true - hide_highlights: true - Description:

J.P. Morgan Private Bank and Asset Management serve UHNW clients and institutions. Follow portfolio strategies, alternatives growth, and institutional fund administration.

From endowments to ETFs, this channel tracks our wealth franchise expansion.

- Tabs: ["Articles"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [{"question": "What qualifies for Private Bank?", "answer": "Clients with >$10M investable assets; contact your coverage advisor."}, {"question": "AUM breakdown?", "answer": "~$3.4T across institutional, retail, and alternatives."}] - **Ch5: Technology & People (SECONDARY)** - Purpose: $17B tech investments, LLM Suite rollout, careers, and workforce programs. - Type: public - Color: #117ACA - image_url: jp/blockchain.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: true - hide_highlights: true - Description:

63,000 technologists power COIN, Athena, Onyx, and $10T daily payments. Track AI/LLM tools, analyst programs, and initiatives like Advancing Black Pathways.

From return-to-office to MD promotions, build your career in a relationship-driven culture.

- Tabs: ["Articles", "Pages"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [{"question": "What is LLM Suite?", "answer": "Internal AI for summarization, research, code; rolled out 2024 per Dimon's 'transformative' vision."}, {"question": "Return-to-office policy?", "answer": "Full in-office for MDs, extended firm-wide; relationships built in-person."}, {"question": "Apprenticeship tracks?", "answer": "Analyst (2yr undergrad), Associate (MBA), Tech Analyst; promotions to MD reviewed globally."}] ### 3. CONTENT CALENDAR **Total is_main_highlight: 4** (FY2024 record, First Republic, Dimon letter excerpt, Info Barriers policy). **Ch1 CIB (3 articles)**: - Title: FY2024 CIB Revenue Hits $59B on #1 League Tables - Type: recap; tags: ['fy2024', 'cib', 'markets', 'league-tables', 'revenue']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true - Body outline: Detail investment banking fees, FX/equities trading, securities services; quote Dimon on franchise strength. - Title: First Republic Acquisition Integration: $173B Loans Absorbed - Type: milestone; tags: ['first-republic', 'acquisition', 'awm', 'integration', '2023']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true - Body outline: FDIC-assisted deal impact on West Coast wealth mgmt; minimally dilutive to capital. - Title: Onyx Blockchain Repo Settlement Milestone - Type: innovation; tags: ['onyx', 'blockchain', 'jpm-coin', 'markets', 'fintech']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false - Body outline: First public blockchain repo tx; ties to $10T payments processing. **Ch2 CCB (3 articles)**: - Title: Chase Sapphire Reserve Redefines Premium Cards Amid $60B Revenue - Type: spotlight; tags: ['ccb', 'chase', 'credit-cards', 'fy2024', 'sapphire']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false - Body outline: 86M customers, branch/ATM network; consumer lending growth. - Title: Commercial Banking Expands to 30K Mid-Market Clients - Type: recap; tags: ['cb', 'commercial', 'treasury', 'lending', 'fy2024']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false - Body outline: $15B revenue; M&A referrals to CIB; secondary city focus. - Title: Payments Infrastructure Handles $10T Daily Volume - Type: milestone; tags: ['payments', 'treasury', 'real-time', 'ccb', 'cb']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true - Body outline: Embedded B2B push; real-time investments. **Ch3 Risk Management & Compliance (3 articles)**: - Title: Information Barrier Policy: Mandatory MNPI Acknowledgement - Type: policy; tags: ['compliance', 'mnpi', 'chinese-walls', 'legal', 'training']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: true; image_url: jp/law.png - Body outline: Strict barriers, no exceptions; annual training; consult Legal. - Title: Fortress Balance Sheet Maintains CET1 Above G-SIB Surcharge - Type: update; tags: ['fortress', 'capital', 'risk', 'cet1', 'fy2024']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true - Body outline: Philosophy since 2006; 2008 crisis proof; liquidity coverage >100%. - Title: Fed Stress Test Results: Strong Capital Position Confirmed - Type: recap; tags: ['stress-test', 'dfast', 'ccar', 'regulatory', 'fed']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false - Body outline: Public results; no distribution restrictions. **Ch4 AWM (2 articles)**: - Title: AWM Grows to $3.4T AUM with Private Bank Expansion - Type: recap; tags: ['awm', 'private-bank', 'aum', 'fy2024', 'institutional']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false; image_url: jp/savings.png - Body outline: UHNW focus >$10M; ETFs/alternatives. - Title: First Republic Adds West Coast Wealth Clients - Type: milestone; tags: ['first-republic', 'awm', 'wealth', 'acquisition', '92b-deposits']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false - Body outline: Integration benefits post-2023 deal. **Ch5 Technology & People (2 articles)**: - Title: LLM Suite Rolled Out: AI Tools for 316K Employees - Type: announcement; tags: ['llm', 'ai', 'technology', '17b-spend', '2024']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true; image_url: jp/blockchain.png - Body outline: Doc summarization/code; Dimon on transformative impact; COIN/Athena/Onyx. - Title: Return-to-Office and MD Promotions: Class of 2024 - Type: policy; tags: ['rto', 'careers', 'md-promo', 'culture', 'analyst']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false; image_url: jp/leadership_speech.png - Body outline: 5-day policy; apprenticeship tracks; workforce programs. ### 4. HUB-LEVEL POLISH - **company_name**: JPMorgan Chase & Co. - **website_name**: JPMorganChase.com - **default_language**: en-US - **supported_languages**: ["en-US"] - **login_quick_links**: [{"text": "Careers", "url": "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {"text": "Investor Relations", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}, {"text": "Newsroom", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories"}, {"text": "Annual Report", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report"}, {"text": "Business Principles", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/governance/business-principles"}] - **sidebar_navigation**: ["documents", "approvalRequests", "collaborators", "learning", "apps", "workgroups", "ideation"] (prioritizes risk/compliance docs/approvals, relationships, tech/learning) This is a complete design. arguments.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet
arguments.description: Central hub for firm-wide updates, line-of-business performance, risk management guidance, regulatory compliance, and tools supporting our Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy.
arguments.welcome_message: Welcome to the JPMorgan Chase & Co. Intranet—your gateway to FY2024 record results, CIB league table leadership, risk framework resources, and updates on our $17B technology investments driving client outcomes globally.

channels.name: Corporate & Investment Bank
channels.description:
The Corporate & Investment Bank drives global deal-making, markets execution, and institutional relationships. Stay informed on #1 league table rankings in M&A advisory, FX trading, and fixed income, alongside FY2024 revenue of ~$59B.

From equity underwriting to securities services custody, this channel covers the engine of our franchise.

channels.name: Consumer & Community Banking
channels.description:
Chase serves ~86M consumers and small businesses through 4,900 branches and Chase.com. Track Sapphire Reserve innovations, credit card leadership, and mortgage/home equity performance.

This channel highlights our retail franchise's role in everyday financial lives.

channels.name: Risk Management & Compliance
channels.description:
Independent risk oversight is our operating system—covering credit, market, liquidity, operational, and conduct risks. Access CET1 targets, VaR metrics, and annual training requirements.

Maintain our G-SIB resilience amid regulatory scrutiny from OCC, Fed, and global bodies.

frequent_questions.question: What is the Information Barrier policy?
frequent_questions.answer: Strict 'Chinese Walls' prevent MNPI sharing between units; consult Legal/Compliance before any cross-unit communication.

frequent_questions.question: How do we report stress test results?
frequent_questions.answer: DFAST/CCAR results are public; our CET1 exceeds minimums per Fortress Balance Sheet.

frequent_questions.question: Who does the CRO report to?
frequent_questions.answer: Directly to Jamie Dimon and the Board Risk Committee for independence.

channels.name: Asset & Wealth Management
channels.description:
J.P. Morgan Private Bank and Asset Management serve UHNW clients and institutions. Follow portfolio strategies, alternatives growth, and institutional fund administration.

From endowments to ETFs, this channel tracks our wealth franchise expansion.

frequent_questions.question: What qualifies for Private Bank?
frequent_questions.answer: Clients with >$10M investable assets; contact your coverage advisor.

channels.name: Technology & People
channels.description:
63,000 technologists power COIN, Athena, Onyx, and $10T daily payments. Track AI/LLM tools, analyst programs, and initiatives like Advancing Black Pathways.

From return-to-office to MD promotions, build your career in a relationship-driven culture.

frequent_questions.question: What is LLM Suite?
frequent_questions.answer: Internal AI for summarization, research, code; rolled out 2024 per Dimon's 'transformative' vision.

frequent_questions.question: Return-to-office policy?
frequent_questions.answer: Full in-office for MDs, extended firm-wide; relationships built in-person.

frequent_questions.question: Apprenticeship tracks?
frequent_questions.answer: Analyst (2yr undergrad), Associate (MBA), Tech Analyst; promotions to MD reviewed globally.
